title: lysimachia tianmaensis
intro: Lysimachia tianmaensis, also known as Tianma, is a type of plant species in the genus Lysimachia, which is native to China and belongs to the primrose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tianma include its ability to relieve anxiety, insomnia, and headaches, as well as its potential to improve memory and cognitive function. In traditional herbal preparations, Tianma is often used in combination with other herbs, such as Ginkgo biloba and Panax ginseng, to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
